description_long: This is a modern fire truck with a bright red body, yellow reflective stripes, and blue emergency lights mounted on the roof. The vehicle features a large cab with two visible doors and black-tinted windows, as well as a rear compartment equipped with hose reels, control panels, and storage areas. The sides of the truck display yellow roller-shutter compartments for firefighting equipment, and the rear has high-visibility chevron striping for safety. The wheels are robust, designed for urban and off-road use, and the front bumper is reinforced for durability. The roof includes a flat platform, likely for additional storage or mounting equipment. The overall design is functional, emphasizing accessibility, safety, and rapid deployment in emergency scenarios.
description: A red fire truck with yellow reflective stripes, blue emergency lights, hose reels, and multiple storage compartments for firefighting equipment.
description_view_0: Rear view showing two large hose reels, control panels, and high-visibility chevron striping.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cab, yellow roller-shutter compartment, and rear equipment area.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the windshield, blue emergency lights, and chevron striping on the bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view with cab, roller-shutter compartment, and rear equipment area visible.
